dependencies: Third-party transportation of crude oil and refined products via pipelines, railways, vessels
Crude oil supply from various domestic and foreign suppliers
Natural gas and electricity supply for refinery operations
risks: Interruptions of supply due to reliance on third-party transportation
Prolonged disruption or cessation of pipeline or railway service
Crude oil supply constraints from producers
Concentration risk in certain transportation modes
Dependence on third-party vessels, pipelines, railcars for crude oil and refined products

regulatory_risks: Environmental laws and regulations (Clean Air Act, Clean Water Act, RCRA, CERCLA, OPA-90)
GHG emissions and climate change regulations
Renewable Fuel Standard (RFS2) compliance and RIN requirements
Low Carbon Fuel Standard (LCFS) programs in California and other states
California Senate Bill No. 2 (SB X1-2) - maximum gross gasoline refining margin and penalties
California Assembly Bill No. 1 (AB X2-1) - minimum inventory requirements
EPA regulations on methane emissions from Oil and Natural Gas Sector
NAAQS (National Ambient Air Quality Standards) changes
California SCAQMD Rule 1109.1 - NOx and CO emission limits
PFAS (per- and polyfluoroalkyl substances) regulations
Vehicle fuel economy and GHG emission standards (CAFE, EPA CO2 standards)
California Advanced Clean Cars I and II programs
Zero emission vehicle mandates in California and other states
DOT regulations on crude-by-rail transportation
OSHA Process Safety Management and EPA Risk Management Program requirements
Maritime Transportation Security Act
Pipeline Security Guidelines
Native American tribal land regulations
Rate regulation by FERC under Interstate Commerce Act
Data privacy laws (GDPR, CCPA)
Windfall profit taxes or maximum margin penalties
Trade tariffs on imported crude oil and feedstocks
Sanctions compliance (Iran, Russia)
Climate-related litigation and disclosure requirements
SEC climate-related disclosure rules (Release No. 33-11275)

sanction_risks: Sanctions against Russia impacting crude oil supply
Hostilities in the Middle East affecting crude oil markets
